mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, unit_price AS unitPrice, unit, expiration_type AS expirationType, storage_method AS storageMethod, min_order_qty AS minOrderQty, product_status AS productStatus, recipe_code AS recipeCode, reg_date AS regDate, upd_date AS updDate, delete_yn AS deleteYn FROM product ORDER BY delete_yn ASC, CASE WHEN product_status = '중지' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, product_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, unit = #{unit}, min_order_qty = #{minOrderQty}, storage_method = #{storageMethod}, expiration_type = #{expirationType}, recipe_code = #{recipeCode}, product_status = #{productStatus}, upd_date = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( product_id, product_name, unit_price, unit, min_order_qty, storage_method, expiration_type, recipe_code, product_status, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{productName}, #{unitPrice}, #{unit}, #{minOrderQty}, #{storageMethod}, #{expirationType},#{recipeCode}, #{productStatus}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT product_id FROM product WHERE product_id LIKE 'FG-%' ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTRING(product_id, 4) AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT 1
